s: In 2017, Mike Hauschild suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 11.250, WHIP 2.000, SO 7, WAR -0.300.
Changed teams after the previous season (TEX -> TOR).
In 2018, Mike Hauschild suited up for TOR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.320, WHIP 1.320, SO 5, WAR 0.000. Notable context: Joined TOR.
